title: The Letter of Prester John
description: The legendary letter from an all-powerful Christian king in the East — sparking centuries of European exploration.
introduction: The legendary letter from an all-powerful Christian king in the East — sparking centuries of European exploration.

translation.text: I, Prester John, by the grace of God king of kings, lord of lords, surpass all kings of the whole world in virtue, riches, and power.
